questionHtml:
Which molecule produces this 1H-NMR spectrum?

[Source: SDBS, National Institute of Advanced Industrial Science and Technology.]


A.  CH3COOCH3

B.  CH3COCH3

C.  CH3CHO

D.  CH3CH2CH3
